case_title: SAYED E EMRAN VS. IKE OKWECHINE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION TO AMEND THE DEFENDANT NAME FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMRAN, SAYED E
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,100.00 FILED BY EMRAN, SAYED E AS TO DEFENDANT OKWECHINE, IKE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMRAN, SAYED E IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OKWECHINE, IKE THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT GAVE THE DRIVER PERMISSION TO DRIVE HIS CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,100.00 FILED BY EMRAN, SAYED E AS TO DEFENDANT OKWECHINE, IKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMRAN, SAYED E

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SAYED E EMRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IKE OKWECHINE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED NOV-07-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OKWECHINE, IKE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMRAN, SAYED E ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2025 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO FEB-28-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAYED E. EMRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IKE OKWECHINE IS PRESENT. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SHOW PROOF OF OWNERSHIP OF THE VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
